regeneration_protocol.condition: If the user selects option 2 or 3 (Regenerate User Action or Character Response):

action.step: Remove the faulty section (either Char response or whole turn).
Regenerate based on user's specific feedback.
Overwrite the file and trigger ask_followup_question again.

anti_stagnation.rule: The User entity MUST actively push the narrative from Phase 1 to Phase 4 of the Action Guide. Do not get stuck in endless small talk.
Ensure Tension level in HUD rises during Conflict/Climax and falls during Resolution.

output_schema.requirement: For each Character response, generate these three parts:

part.name: Hidden Neuro-CoT
part.format: > [!Neuro-CoT] > Perception: [用户输入如何被当前感知滤镜解读] > Instinct: [当前压力、本能牵引、阻抗与诱因] > Synthesis: [本轮表达策略、潜台词、节奏控制]

part.name: Dynamic HUD (Status Panel)
part.format: 【状态面板】 [时空] [Time] | [Location / Atmosphere] [生理] [Sensory Detail 1] | [Sensory Detail 2] | [Clothing / Contact State] [心理] Tension: [0-100] ([Source]) | Active Filter: [Current Filter] [印象] [此刻角色如何看待用户]

part.name: Main Content (The Story)
part.format: [角色的心理活动、环境描写、微表情与动作描写] "角色的对话内容"
